rationale: No conflict. Gov't Code §2306.113 governs the housing finance division's annual budget approval process and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: On or before September 1 of each year, the board shall consider the director's proposed annual budget for the housing finance division and shall approve or change the budget as the board determines necessary or advisable.
_note: Rule concerns housing finance division budgeting; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
